description: Product description Achieve a bright, glowing complexion with our Vitamin C cleansing wipes, the perfect addition to your skincare routine for both face and body. Each pack contains 25 biodegradable wipes, offering a practical and eco-friendly solution for cleansing on the go. Made with 95% natural-origin ingredients, these wipes are enriched with Vitamin C, known for its brightening and rejuvenating benefits, to leave your skin feeling refreshed and radiant. Vegan and PETA-approved, these wipes provide a quick, mess-free cleansing experience, ideal for busy lifestyles. Gentle yet effective, they help remove dirt and impurities while treating your skin with care, ensuring a smooth, nourished and revitalised appearance. Directions Remove the wipe from its packaging. Gently wipe the face or body until clean. Dispose of the used wipe. Close the container lid tightly after use to prevent the remaining wipes from drying out. Safety Warning CAUTION: FOR EXTERNAL USE ONLY. AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS INTO THE EYES RINSE WELL WITH WATER IMMEDIATELY. DISCONTINUE USE IF IRRITATION OCCURS. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. PATCH TESTING PRIOR TO USE IS ADVISED. DO NOT APPLY TO BROKEN OR IRRITATED SKIN. STORE IN A DRY AND COOL PLACE BELOW 25◦C. DO NOT FLUSH. See more
